issues.sample: I was driving and the vehicle cluster display and radio went out. I was unable to see how fast i was going and any system info. It eventually came back on. During this time the car was continuing to drive but unable to see any lane - blindspot warning or speed or system controls

narrative.headline: What 2024 Chevrolet Trailblazer owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 32 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (34% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
